bluesky-open-network-provider: Bluesky is an open network where you can choose your own provider. If you're new here, we recommend sticking with the default Bluesky Social option.
developer-host-own-server: If you're a developer, you can host your own server.
bluesky-hosting-provider: Bluesky is an open network where you can choose your hosting provider. If you're a developer, you can host your own server.
